urls.help.p1: Manage the stored seed URL list for a domain. These URLs feed discovery/capture workflows.
about.overview.p1: Polyglot Watchdog is a pipeline and operator interface for building an English reference dataset and detecting localization issues across languages.
about.overview.p2: It combines automated capture, structured extraction, operator review, deterministic element pairing, and issue generation. This repository UI mainly acts as an operator/development console for those workflows.
about.problem.p1: Localization QA is difficult to automate because pages include dynamic content, repeated templates, and elements that should not always be compared one-to-one.
about.problem.p2: Polyglot Watchdog addresses this by capturing pages under controlled contexts, extracting stable elements, applying operator rules, and comparing eligible EN reference data with target-language captures.
about.problem.current_ui_reality_text: issue artifacts can be produced by backend phases, but parts of the visible UI still use mock-backed paths.
about.pipeline.phase0.p: Builds URL inventory artifacts for a domain and run.
about.pipeline.phase1.p: Captures screenshots and extracts page items (text, images, buttons, inputs) with stable identifiers.
about.pipeline.phase2.p: Stores rules such as IGNORE_ENTIRE_ELEMENT, MASK_VARIABLE, and ALWAYS_COLLECT.
about.pipeline.phase3.p: Builds the eligible EN dataset by applying rules and review status filters.
about.pipeline.phase6.p: Pairs EN and target-language items, then writes issue records with contextual evidence such as IDs, bounding boxes, and screenshot references.
about.pipeline.scope_note_text: pairing and issue writing are implemented, but this UI does not yet expose every backend comparison detail as a dedicated operator screen.
about.capture_contexts.p1: A capture context includes URL, viewport kind, state, and optional user tier. Language is runtime configuration but excluded from context identity.
about.capture_contexts.p2: Page and element IDs are deterministic so matching is stable across runs. Element identity excludes text content to avoid translation text changing identity.
about.review_rerun.p1: Review records are saved by capture context and language and are consumed when building eligible EN data. Operators can request exact-context reruns using the same runtime dimensions.
about.review_rerun.p2: Later comparison phases generate issue artifacts for target runs.
about.artifacts.p: Artifacts are stored per domain/run, with screenshots kept under deterministic page IDs.
about.workflow.li6: Capture target-language pages and run comparison.
about.workflow.p: Some steps are currently triggered through backend endpoints that are not yet fully represented by dedicated UI pages.
about.glossary.capture_context_text: runtime capture dimensions for a page (identity excludes language).
about.glossary.page_id_text: deterministic page identifier from context identity fields.
about.glossary.template_rules_text: annotation decisions that shape the eligible dataset.
about.glossary.eligible_dataset_text: filtered English reference artifact used for comparison.
about.glossary.exact_context_rerun_text: replaying capture with the same context parameters.
testbench.page_help.p1: This is an internal module-level test runner for development and validation tasks.
testbench.page_help.li1: Select a module from the left panel.
testbench.page_help.li2: Load a test case to inspect inputs/expected data.
testbench.page_help.li3: Run test executes the selected module case and shows assertions/validation output.
testbench.page_help.p2: This is exploratory tooling and not part of the normal operator production flow.
testbench.note: Manual module testing console for current implemented Polyglot Watchdog phases.

testbench.modules.phase0.title: Phase 0: URL Discovery
testbench.modules.phase0.description: Discovers canonical URLs and emits url_inventory.json.
testbench.modules.phase1.title: Phase 1: Data Collection
testbench.modules.phase1.description: Collects page screenshots and extracted items.
testbench.modules.phase2.title: Phase 2: Annotation / Template Rules
testbench.modules.phase2.description: Stores template_rules decisions for item-level handling.
testbench.modules.phase3.title: Phase 3: Eligible Dataset / Reference Build
testbench.modules.phase3.description: Builds eligible_dataset.json from pulled artifacts and rules.
testbench.modules.phase5.title: Phase 5: Normalization
testbench.modules.phase5.description: Deterministic text normalization preserving significant spacing.
testbench.modules.phase6.title: Phase 6: Localization QA / Issues Detection
testbench.modules.phase6.description: Compares EN and target artifacts and emits issues.json.
